Class Loc

java.lang.Object
sims.world.Loc
All Implemented Interfaces:
Location
Direct Known Subclasses:
Home, HomeLocation, OutsideLocation
public abstract class Loc extends Object implements Location
An abstract class used to represent a location in the Sims world. A location has a name, a list of activities that can be performed there, and a list of Sims currently present in the location.

This class provides methods to add and remove Sims, manage activities, and define movement behavior through the abstract moveTo(Sim) method. Subclasses should implement specific movement logic depending on the type of location.

    • moveTo

      public abstract void moveTo(Sim sim)
      Defines how a Sim moves to this location. Subclasses must implement specific movement behavior.
      Specified by:
      moveTo in interface Location
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim that is moving to this location
